name: proofir-c11-algebra-to-c11-source-core
author: T Savo

target.entryShape: single int function with int parameters

realizer.determinism: byte-equal term JSON and target descriptor produce byte-equal C source

operationMapping.obligation: target sequencing preserves source statement order

operationMapping.target: statement position emits if c { t } else { e }; expression position emits (c) ? (t) : (e)
operationMapping.obligation: C selects the same branch as the source conditional
loop entry, exit, break, and continue preserve the source control flow
the returned C value is the lowered value of e
callee and argument order match the source term
control transfers to the nearest enclosing loop exit
control transfers to the nearest enclosing loop head
the C identifier denotes the same term variable
the target literal denotes the same accepted integer value
integer comparison results agree with the C11 integer semantics selected by the source signature
integer arithmetic agrees with the accepted C11 integer subset
truth values preserve the C zero false and nonzero true convention
the read observes the same address in the accepted memory model

operationMapping.target: lv = (e); in statement position, (lv = (e)) in expression position
operationMapping.obligation: the write updates the same lvalue in the accepted memory model

homomorphismObligation.operationPreservation: compile(apply(op,args)) = target_apply(image(op), map(compile,args)) for every mapped operation
homomorphismObligation.equationPreservation: for each source equation in the accepted C11 signature, the emitted C behavior entails the compiled equation under C11 semantics
homomorphismObligation.dischargeStatus: draft only, no MorphismDischargeReceipt minted in this crate

contractPreservation.statement: For any accepted term t in the core subset, contract(lift_from_c(compile_to_c(t))) = contract(t).
contractPreservation.composition: This morphism composes with the existing c-collectors-defensive lifter c -> algebra morphism to give a round trip whose contract is the identity.
contractPreservation.obligation: discharged by composition after the algebra -> c morphism receipt and the c-collectors-defensive lifter receipt are minted
contractPreservation.followUpReceipt: round-trip identity receipt for c -> algebra -> c

refusalPolicy.unsafeIdentifiers: refuse term variables and callees that are not valid C identifiers

deferred: minting the c -> algebra -> c identity receipt
